description_long: This object is a flintlock-style shotgun with a short, wide, and flared black barrel, reminiscent of a blunderbuss. The stock and grip are made of a brown wood-like material, featuring a gold-colored butt plate and decorative gold accents along the body and trigger area. The trigger guard is large and rounded, matching the gold color of the other metallic parts. Three gold bands encircle the barrel near the breech, adding both structural and decorative elements. The overall design is compact, with a pronounced curve to the grip and a robust, historical appearance. The object lacks modern features such as a pump or magazine, emphasizing its classic, single-shot construction.
description: A compact, flintlock-style shotgun with a flared black barrel, brown wooden stock, and gold metallic accents. The design is ornate and historical, with a large rounded trigger guard and decorative barrel bands.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown wooden stock, gold trigger guard, and flared black barrel with three gold bands.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, flared muzzle of the black barrel and the gold bands encircling it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the curved wooden stock, gold accents, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the width of the barrel, the alignment of the gold bands, and the flatness of the stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, flared muzzle with three gold bands and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Large, rounded trigger guard with a smooth, continuous curve and no finger grooves or reinforcement
